# Classify

Classify is a kids educational platform with parental controls.
Primary site: https://classi-fy.com/
Sitemap: https://classi-fy.com/sitemap.xml

## Public product pages
- https://classi-fy.com/
- https://classi-fy.com/download
- https://classi-fy.com/trial-games
- https://classi-fy.com/about
- https://classi-fy.com/contact
- https://classi-fy.com/parent-auth

## Legal and policy pages
- https://classi-fy.com/legal
- https://classi-fy.com/privacy-policy
- https://classi-fy.com/terms
- https://classi-fy.com/child-safety
- https://classi-fy.com/cookie-policy
- https://classi-fy.com/refund-policy
- https://classi-fy.com/acceptable-use
- https://classi-fy.com/accessibility
- https://classi-fy.com/delete-account

## Content usage guidance
- Index public pages listed above.
- Do not access or index private dashboard routes.
- Do not access or index API endpoints under /api/.
- Prefer canonical URLs on classi-fy.com.
- Respect robots.txt directives.
